_meta.description: REAL NVDA daily closes around the 10-for-1 split effective 2024-06-10.
_meta.source: Yahoo Finance v8 chart API (query1.finance.yahoo.com), fetched 2026-06-09

splitEvent.source: Yahoo Finance chart events=split (real corporate-action record)

_meta.adjustedClose: Yahoo split-adjusted close, fetched DIRECTLY and used unchanged. No split artifact across the window.
_meta.reconstructedRawClose: As-traded (unadjusted) close = directly-fetched adjusted close x10 for bars BEFORE 2024-06-10, x1 after. This restores NVDA actual pre-split traded price (~$1208 on 2024-06-07) — the value Alpha Vantage TIME_SERIES_DAILY would return. NOT a direct raw download (free unadjusted-history endpoints are premium-gated); it is deterministically RECONSTRUCTED from the real adjusted closes and the real 10:1 split factor, both fetched above. Labeled reconstructed_raw to avoid over-claiming.
